item.title: Junior Staff Post
item.content:encoded:
The images in this article are not compatible with the SCP wiki's license (CC-BY-SA 3.0) due to the inclusion of NC in their licenses. Therefore, they have been removed.

EDIT: The non-compliant images were replaced with cc-compliant images.

item.title: Re: From the Author
item.content:encoded: There’s some redacted parts that aren’t all uppercase. That was just bothering me a little. Good SCP though.

item.title: Re: Grammatical Error
item.content:encoded: Normally, it is in all caps, rather than the capitalization of only the first letter. Sorry if the title "Grammatical Error" caused some confusion.

item.title: Re: Grammatical Error
item.content:encoded: The first one I did, and I am going to change that now. That second thing I am not entirely sure what you mean. Do you mean that it is not capitalized?

item.title: Grammatical Error
item.content:encoded:
"SCP-4770-1 is a cake composed of entirely of only hardened white frosting."

Did you mean to say "composed entirely of only…"

EDIT: Also, for "SCP-4770-2 proceeds to [Redacted]," did you mean [REDCTED]

EDIT: For "Agent Rutteb, hands visibly shaking," Did you mean to bold Agent Rutteb.

item.title: Re: Size?
item.content:encoded: I didn't count the proboscis in the initial measurement. That was supposed to be the size without it. I know its rather large but the creature is supposed to fit inside a stomach and the proboscis down a throat, so that was the constraint I had to work around.

item.title: Size?
item.content:encoded:
“0.030-0.040 mm long.” “a proboscis that is roughly 0.25 meters in length.”
So it is less than a millimeter in length but has a proboscis that is 25cm in length?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: fwiw the last lines are what got a +1 from me. Predicable? maybe maybe not. but predictable doesn't mean bad.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Do you have any suggestions? I would love to make the logs and the bakery part better.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: There’s a neat concept here, marred by predictable and awkwardly cinematic addenda. That, and how overused the referral to some higher being by an anomaly is, as well as the ending line (he doesn’t want the parasite removed). There could have been some cool implications to bakery-based parasites, perhaps through an effect that isn’t essentially complete mind control.

item.title: Re: Oh! Found something!
item.content:encoded: Whoops, thank you! Dam replace all function! Correcting this now!

item.title: Oh! Found something!
item.content:encoded:
Hey there, Sobelium! I think I just found an error:

Personnel entering SCP-4770X containment chamber are required to wear Foundation issued gas masks.

Please correct me if I am wrong, but I believe you have "SCP-4770X," as opposed to "SCP-4770's"?

item.title: From the Author
item.content:encoded:
Hey Guys! First SCP, hope you guys like it! Quick note, this is where the pictures are from!
(Edit, first round of pictures were not compliant to the site. Whoops. Second round is below)

First picture came from: https://www.maxpixel.net/static/photo/2x/Sweet-Cake-Food-Celebration-Cream-Plate-Wedding-3264250.jpg

(https://www.maxpixel.net/Sweet-Cake-Food-Celebration-Cream-Plate-Wedding-3264250)

Second picture came from: https://c1.staticflickr.com/1/357/19758925923_e75d130854_b.jpg

(https://www.flickr.com/photos/internetarchivebookimages/19758925923)

Hope you enjoy!

-Also big thanks to Leveritas for the critiques!

Edit: Its come to my attention the pictures were not working. AlleraRey has permission to edit the article.
Thank you a ton friend for helping to get this thing back online and working. Could not have done it without you.
